description: Is valid UTF-8 encoded JSON per RFC 8259. Duplicate JSON object keys within any object make the document invalid.
notes: Negative cases (malformed UTF-8, parser-rejected duplicate keys) cannot be expressed as inline JSON fixtures because the test harness's JSON parser would normalize or reject them before the fixture reaches a validator. Such cases require raw-text or raw-byte fixtures handled outside this corpus's inline format. The positive cases below confirm that well-formed JSON OBI documents pass.

tests.description: OBI document exercising several JSON value types
